info.title: The Prompting Company API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for The Prompting Company organization-scoped API routes.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description:
Organization-scoped API key. Available scopes:
- content:read: Read site pages, markdown content, and llms.txt files
- content:write: Create, update, and delete site pages and content
- prompts:read: Read prompts, topics, and prompt analysis results
- prompts:write: Create, update, archive prompts
- simulations:read: Read agent-simulation tasks, runs, environments, and analytics
- simulations:write: Create and trigger simulation runs
- logs:read: Read AI-traffic logs and request-level audit events
- analytics:read: Read analytics aggregates (rankings, mentions, sources, SOV)
- products:read: Read product metadata and competitor data
- products:write: Update product settings and competitor lists

x-scopes.content:read: Read site pages, markdown content, and llms.txt files
x-scopes.content:write: Create, update, and delete site pages and content
x-scopes.prompts:read: Read prompts, topics, and prompt analysis results

x-scopes.logs:read: Read AI-traffic logs and request-level audit events
x-scopes.analytics:read: Read analytics aggregates (rankings, mentions, sources, SOV)
x-scopes.products:read: Read product metadata and competitor data
x-scopes.products:write: Update product settings and competitor lists

bearerAuth.description:
Bearer session or OAuth access token. Available OAuth scopes:
- content:read: Read site pages, markdown content, and llms.txt files
- content:write: Create, update, and delete site pages and content
- prompts:read: Read prompts, topics, and prompt analysis results
- prompts:write: Create, update, archive prompts
- simulations:read: Read agent-simulation tasks, runs, environments, and analytics
- simulations:write: Create and trigger simulation runs
- logs:read: Read AI-traffic logs and request-level audit events
- analytics:read: Read analytics aggregates (rankings, mentions, sources, SOV)
- products:read: Read product metadata and competitor data
- products:write: Update product settings and competitor lists

x-scopes.products:write: Update product settings and competitor lists

post.description: Deprecated, will be removed in future versions. Please use the Apps equivalent.

slug.description: Page slug or file path, for example 'blog/my-post'

domainIds.description: Optional custom domain IDs to attach to the page. Domains must belong to the product and be active web domains.

canonicalDomainId.description: Optional attached custom domain ID to mark as canonical and use for the page source URL.

patch.description: Deprecated, will be removed in future versions. Please use the Apps equivalent.

filePath.description: Optional replacement path or slug for the page

isManual.description: Optional override for whether the page is manual

redirectToUrl.description: Optional redirect target URL, or null to clear it

attachDomainIds.description: Optional custom domain IDs to attach to the page. Domains must belong to the product and be active web domains.

detachDomainIds.description: Optional custom domain IDs to detach from the page. Detached domains can no longer be canonical.

canonicalDomainId.description: Optional attached custom domain ID to mark as canonical and use for the page source URL.

delete.description: Deprecated, will be removed in future versions. Please use the Apps equivalent.

put.summary: Save and publish web-domain routing config
